items.name: Ballin' 67 Oversized Basketball Shirt
items.description:
Imagine how cool it would be to show up for a basketball game with a jersey with the number 67.

Well, now you can! Plus, it has lots of other cool halftone designs, including a basketball and text.

If you want a cool chain with a big 67 medallion on it, get the Big Gold 67 Chain here:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog/103020408733598

This shirt is designed as a "dress" item. Therefore, it will layer under the 67 chain. These two clothing items will work well together.
